Package com.shaft.gui.playwright.validation

package com.shaft.gui.playwright.validation
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    PlaywrightBrowserValidationsBuilder
     
    PlaywrightDriverAssertions
     
    PlaywrightDriverVerifications
     
    PlaywrightElementValidationsBuilder
     
    PlaywrightVisualComparisonOptions
    Playwright variant of VisualComparisonOptions that adds a Playwright Locator-based mask(...) overload, for use with the Playwright engine's assertThat(...).matchesScreenshot(options) assertion.
    PlaywrightVisualValidationsBuilder
    Playwright variant of VisualValidationsBuilder: adds a Playwright Locator-based mask(...) overload and routes PlaywrightVisualValidationsBuilder.perform() through PlaywrightValidationsExecutor instead of the Selenium-oriented base executor.
